relabelled_senses.definition: Used in constructions such as 'dar de narices con' to mean 'to come up against' or 'to encounter unexpectedly' (literally 'to bump into/meet face to face').

literal: indicates a very large, extreme, or extraordinary degree
newly created or of recent origin

relabelled_senses.definition: Never-ending; endless; interminable, used to describe something that seems to have no end.
By hearsay; based on what one has heard from others rather than on direct, personal knowledge.

literal: describing an attitude or behavior of commanding and expecting unquestioned obedience

relabelled_senses.definition: Of poor quality; cheap, shoddy, or flimsy.

literal: an emphatic intensifier meaning thorough, complete, or substantial

relabelled_senses.definition: Wearing ordinary civilian clothes rather than an official uniform; used especially of police, security personnel, or officials working out of uniform or undercover.
Riding as a passenger on a motorcycle behind the driver (a pillion passenger); travelling on the rear seat or straddling behind the rider.
Completely open; wide open (applied to doors, windows, or other openings).
Very infrequently; only on rare occasions; from time to time (literally 'from Easter to Palm Sunday', used to indicate long intervals between occurrences).
Of the highest quality and authenticity, originally applied to top-grade Iberian ham (jamón ibérico) raised from pure-bred animals; premium, genuine.
From beginning to end; in every detail; completely and thoroughly.
Fake; imitation; not genuine or authentic (applied to objects or persons).

literal: since the situation is already bad or nothing remains to be lost, one might as well take a chance or do something radical

relabelled_senses.definition: not talkative; habitually sparing in speech; taciturn
For the duration of a person's natural life; lifelong; continuing until death.
Stylish, fashionable, or high-class; associated with social prestige or elegance.
